title: Drive Forward
failMsg: You didn't reach the finish! Try using a move forward block.

title: Clean Run
failMsg: You crashed! Try slowing down with set speed, or find a clearer path.

title: Turn the Corner
description: Reach the finish after at least 1 turn.
failMsg: You need to make at least one turn! Try adding a turn left or turn right block.

title: Obstacle Course
failMsg: You hit an obstacle! Try using the distance sensor to stop or turn before crashing.

title: Follow the Line
description: Stay on the line for 5s continuously.
failMsg: You lost the line! Write a loop that steers you back onto the track.

title: Full Course
description: Finish the line track and stay on the line for 5s.
failMsg: Try combining obstacle avoidance and line following logic!
